title: Any one know what is Key of Nebuchadnezzar
display_title: Any one know what is Key of Nebuchadnezzar
wikitext:
[]: Any one know what is "Key of Nebuchadnezzar"? Post by shinji kun » Sun Apr 24, 2011 10:07 am When Kaji visited Gendo in the beginning of Evangelion 2.0, he delivered a suitcase that contains "Key of Nebuchadnezzar"? I don't know what's that at all!! xD For what it's used? Why Kaji delivered it to Gendo? Anybody can explain to me about that?

[]: Post by MegucaMagica » Sun Apr 24, 2011 10:21 am i don't know. In the EvaTV if my memory is correct kagi gave gendo a part of Adam. I have no clue as to the importance of this key.

[]: Post by Kendrix » Sun Apr 24, 2011 10:24 am There already is a thread for this in the Rebuild Forum. Butz mostly, no one knows WTF it is because Rebuild isn't finished yet and that thing was not in Old!NGE. Judging by the dialogue, it is instrumentality-related.

[]: Post by GoGoGengar » Fri Apr 29, 2011 12:57 pm I know but I'm not gonna tell you ;) Now seriously, it seems pointless trying to figure that out right now. Just wait for Rebuild 3.0 or Q (I don't really remember the name) That's what I'm doing

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 29, 2011 1:02 pm Thread discussion is over here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=8587
